versions.version_description: The chords are unusual but accurate so you must use the ones that are outlined at the start, using any other variations won't sound right. No capo is needed and tuning is a Half-Step Down (Eb tuning).
This version sounds like the studio version and uses the same chord variants. Enjoy.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
By Ben Sullivan 06/09/07

CHORDS:

Ebm9     x 6 4 6 6 x
Ab/Bb    x 1 1 1 1 1
Bb       x 1 3 3 3 1
B/C#     x 4 4 4 4 4
Gb/Ab    4 4 4 3 2 2
Ab       4 6 6 5 4 4
Ebm7     x 6 8 6 7 6
Fm7      x 8 10 8 9 8
GbM7     x 9 11 10 11 9
BM7      x 2 4 3 4 2
Bbm7     x 1 3 1 2 1
Eb9      x 6 5 6 6 x
C/D      x 5 5 5 5 5
Em9      x 7 5 7 7 x
A/B      x 2 2 2 2 2
B        x 2 4 4 4 2
G/A      5 5 5 4 3 3
A        5 7 7 6 5 5


[Intro]
[ch]Ebm9[/ch]         [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]
[ch]Ebm9[/ch]         [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]   [ch]B/C#[/ch]
[ch]Ebm9[/ch]         [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]
[ch]Gb/Ab[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]    [ch]Gb/Ab[/ch]   [ch]Ab[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]   [ch]Gb/Ab[/ch]
 Girl, Close Your Eyes[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
Let That Rhythm Get Into You[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]          [ch]Gb/Ab[/ch]
 Don't Try To Fight It[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
There Ain't Nothin' That You Can Do[/tab]

(Notes: [ch]Ab[/ch]   [ch]Gb[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Db[/ch])

[tab][ch]GbM7[/ch]        [ch]Fm7[/ch]
 Relax Your Mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]BM7[/ch]               [ch]Gb/Ab[/ch]
 Lay Back And Groove With Mine[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Ebm7[/ch] [ch]Fm7[/ch]  [ch]GbM7[/ch]
You Got To Feel That Heat[/tab]
N.C.
And We Can Ride The Boogie
[tab][ch]Ebm7[/ch]  [ch]Fm7[/ch]  [ch]GbM7[/ch]    [ch]Gb/Ab[/ch]
Share That Beat Of Love[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Ebm9[/ch]           [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
I Wanna Rock With You (All    Night)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]                [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch] [ch]B/C#[/ch]
Dance You Into Day (Sunlight)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Ebm9[/ch]           [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
I Wanna Rock With You (All    Night)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Gb/Ab[/ch]    [ch]Ab[/ch]      [ch]Gb/Ab[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]
We're Gonna Rock The Night Away[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]         [ch]Gb/Ab[/ch]             [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
 Out On The Floor, There Ain't Nobody There But Us[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]            [ch]Gb/Ab[/ch]            [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]
 Girl, When You Dance, There's A Magic That Must Be Love[/tab]
[tab][ch]GbM7[/ch]          [ch]Fm7[/ch]
 Just Take It Slow,[/tab]
[tab][ch]BM7[/ch]               [ch]Gb/Ab[/ch]
 'Cause We Got So Far To Go[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Ebm7[/ch] [ch]Fm7[/ch]  [ch]GbM7[/ch]
When You Feel That Heat[/tab]
N.C.
And We're Gonna Ride The Boogie
[tab][ch]Ebm7[/ch]  [ch]Fm7[/ch]  [ch]GbM7[/ch]    [ch]Gb/Ab[/ch]
Share That Beat Of Love[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Ebm9[/ch]           [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
I Wanna Rock With You (All    Night)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebm9[/ch]                [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch] [ch]B/C#[/ch]
Dance You Into Day (Sunlight)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Ebm9[/ch]           [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]  [ch]Bb[/ch]
I Wanna Rock With You (All    Night)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Gb/Ab[/ch]    [ch]Ab[/ch]      [ch]Gb/Ab[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]
We're Gonna Rock The Night Away[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]                                 [ch]Eb9[/ch]
 And When The Groove Is Dead And Gone (Yeah)[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]GbM7[/ch]    [ch]Fm7[/ch]
You Know That Love Survives[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]BM7[/ch]     [ch]Gb/Ab[/ch]
So We Can Rock Forever, On[/tab]


[Bridge]
[ch]Ebm9[/ch]     [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]
[ch]Ebm9[/ch]     [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]     [ch]B/C#[/ch]
[ch]Ebm9[/ch]     [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]     [ch]Bb/C[/ch]   [ch]B/C#[/ch]

I Wanna Rock With You

I Wanna Groove With You

[ch]Ebm9[/ch]     [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]
[ch]Ebm9[/ch]     [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]     [ch]B/C#[/ch]
[ch]Ebm9[/ch]     [ch]Ab/Bb[/ch]     [ch]Bb/C[/ch]   [ch]B/C#[/ch]

I Wanna Rock With You
[tab]        [ch]C/D[/ch]
I Wanna Groove With You[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Em9[/ch]   [ch]A/B[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
I Wanna Rock (All  Night)[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Em9[/ch]  [ch]A/B[/ch]  [ch]C/D[/ch]
Girl   (Sunlight)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch]                                       [ch]A/B[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
Rock With You, Rock With You Girl (Yeah) (All  Night)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/A[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]G/A[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Dance The Night Away[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em9[/ch]            [ch]A/B[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
I Wanna Rock With You (All  Night)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em9[/ch]                [ch]A/B[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
Rock You Into Day (Sunlight)[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em9[/ch]            [ch]A/B[/ch]  [ch]B[/ch]
I Wanna Rock With You (All  Night)[/tab]
[tab][ch]G/A[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]G/A[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
Rock The Night Away[/tab]
